SupplementalInformationDetail_Explanatio: STUDENT ADVOCACY CENTER SHARED CONCERNS ABOUT THE NEEDS OF UNDERSERVED STUDENTS AND UNDER-RESOURCED SCHOOLS THROUGH ONE-ON-ONE MEETINGS WITH LEGISLATORS, SMALL GROUP MEETINGS WITH LEGISLATORS, AND FORMAL WRITTEN COMMUNICATION. WE PARTICIPATED IN ADVOCACY DAYS IN LANSING. WE PROVIDED EXPERT ADVICE ON POTENTIAL LEGISLATIVE CHANGES TO BETTER SUPPORT STUDENTS EXPERIENCING FOSTER CARE. WE ENGAGED YOUTH, CAREGIVERS AND COMMUNITY MEMBERS IN ADVOCATING FOR MORE SUPPORT OF PUBLIC SCHOOLS THROUGH PHONE BANKING, ACTION ALERTS, PETITIONS, ETC.
